ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class year of the athlete (e.g., FR, SO, JR, SR) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the athlete on the team */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "simple_hometown" TEXT /* Simplified version of the athlete's hometown */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label combining athlete details for display purposes */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the athlete's hometown */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the athlete's hometown */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birthdate of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "major" TEXT /* Academic major of the athlete */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_hometown FOREIGN KEY ("hometown") REFERENCES hometowns ("city"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES classes ("class_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the team plays */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the team plays */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference affiliation of the team */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Current division rank of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach leads */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the coach */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that uses the stadium */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the stadium */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Surface type of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., team, individual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the position is associated with */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of position (e.g., offense, defense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., FR, SO, JR, SR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_year" INTEGER /* Year of the class (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hometowns" (
  "hometown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hometown */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the hometown */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the hometown */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the hometown */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hometown */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hometown */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the hometown */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hometown_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., goals, assists, yards) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., scoring, passing) */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, trainer, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of access for the role (e.g., admin, coach, athlete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed (e.g., athlete_id, team_id) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team affiliation */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the athlete started with the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the athlete ended with the team */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of affiliation (e.g., current, former) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_affiliations_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_affiliations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement or award */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of achievement (e.g., award, recognition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
